headline: Wall Street follows global markets lower with missiles fired at Israel and confusion on peace talks
summary: Wall Street followed global markets lower and oil prices jumped above $100 per barrel on Thursday as a de-escalation of the Iran war appeared further out of reach.  Nasdaq futures lost 0.8%.  Iran and the United States hardened their positions as a diplomatic push for a ceasefire in the Middle East war appeared to falter on Thursday, sending oil prices back up.

headline: Worker sues Valero over Texas refinery explosion
summary: HOUSTON, March 25 (Reuters) - A man who said he was injured in an explosion at Valero Energy's Port Arthur, ‌Texas refinery on Monday night filed a lawsuit on Wednesday in ‌a state district court alleging the company failed to properly maintain the refinery. The lawsuit filed ​in the Jefferson County District Court in Beaumont, Texas, seeks more than $1 million in damages.
